heading_content_part: App Lock Privacy Policy: App Lock Privacy PolicyApp Lock Privacy Policy2016年7月28日星期四App Lock Privacy PolicyThis document clarifies how User data and any sensitive information is handled in the App.

Read Phone State:This is used to detect whether the phone is calling when your screen is off, if your phone is calling, the timer of locked apps will not be reset, otherwise, the timer will be reset. (The timer is used to prevent frequently repeated lock of your apps).
Get Tasks:Get the top running apps of your phone and decide lock it or not.
Package Usage StatsSame as Get Tasks. (Get Tasks is not working on newer Android OS, so we have to use Package Usage Stats to get the top running apps).
